chunks.title: The Anointed One's Mission
chunks.reason: A continuous declaration of the Spirit-anointed mission to bring good news and comfort.

chunks.title: Restoration and Priestly Status
chunks.reason: A prophetic vision describing the rebuilding of cities and the elevated status of God's people.

chunks.title: God's Covenant and Justice
chunks.reason: Yahweh explains the basis for the blessing through His love of justice and the resulting covenant.

chunks.title: Joy and Righteousness
chunks.reason: A personal expression of joy followed by a metaphorical conclusion about the growth of righteousness.
